MOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINITFF S IME ON SHORTENED TIME (TRANSACTION ID # 58893539) FILED BY DEFENDANT LABRIER, ROBERT C. HEARING SET FOR APR-29-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROBERT LABRIER'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINITFF'S IME ON SHORTENED TIME IS GRANTED. UNLESS HE STATES THAT HE WILL NOT HAVE SURGERY PRIOR TO MAY 16, 2016, PLAINTIFF PAUL CHESTNUT MUST SUBMIT TO AN IME ON EITHER MAY 2, 2016 AT NOON OR MAY 4, 2016 AT 10AM. MR. LABRIER HAS SHOWN GOOD CAUSE THIS MOTION AND MR. CHESTNUT HAS NOT SHOWN HOW HE WOULD BE HARMED BY THE GRANTING OF THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-31-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plainitff S Ime On Shortened Time
Off Calendar Apr-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROBERT LABRIER'S Motion To Compel Plainitff's Idependent Medical Examination On Shortened Time is granted. Unless he states that he will not have surgery prior to May 16, 2016, Plaintiff Paul Chestnut must submit to an IME on either May 2, 2016 at noon or May 4, 2016 at 10am. Mr. LaBrier has shown good cause this motion and Mr. Chestnut has not shown how he would be harmed by the granting of the motion. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Off Calendar
